title: Relay does not broadcast typing=false on client disconnect
description: When a client sends typing=true and then disconnects before sending typing=false, peers are left with a stale 'is typing' indicator until their local timeout expires. The relay could synthesize and broadcast a TypingNotify{from, typing:false} on connection close if that client had sent a typing=true notification during the session. This avoids all clients needing to implement a timeout and prevents phantom typing indicators on abrupt disconnect. Requires tracking per-session typing state on the relay.
close_reason: track connection_is_typing per session; on disconnect synthesize typing_notify{typing:false} before user_left if outstanding
